REMITTITUR FILED THIS CAUSE HAVING BEEN ARGUED AND SUBMITTED, THE COURT FINDS THAT THERE IS NO ERROR IN THE RECORD PREJUDICIAL TO THE APPELLANT. THEREFORE IT IS ORDERED BY THE COURT THAT THE ORDER MADE AND ENTERED IN THE MUNICIPAL COURT, IN THE ABOVE ENTITLED CAUSE IS HEREBY AFFIRMED. PURSUANT TO SEC. 1034 CCP AND RULES 135(A),(B)&(C) OF THE CRC, COSTS ARE HEREBY AWARDED THE PREVAILING PARTY.
